languages.text: "Верные слова". {n}Ульфар важно кивает.{/n} "На Фенрисе в Караул отправляют лишь тех, кто побывал во многих тысячах битв с чужаками и вернулся с победой. Немногие могут похвастаться подобной удалью".
"Truly said." {n}Ulfar nods gravely.{/n} "On Fenris, the ones sent to the Deathwatch are those who have fought thousands of battles and returned victorious. Few can boast of such a feat."
languages.original_text: "Верные слова". {n}Ульфар важно кивает.{/n} "На Фенрисе в Караул отправляют лишь тех, кто побывал во многих тысячах битв с чужаками и вернулся с победой. Немногие могут похвастаться подобной удалью".

traits.locale_text: "Truly said." {n}Ulfar nods with gravity.{/n} "On Fenris, the ones sent to the Deathwatch are those who have fought thousands of battles and returned victorious. Few can boast of such a feat."
"Truly said." {n}Ulfar nods gravely.{/n} "On Fenris, the ones sent to the Deathwatch are those who have fought thousands of battles and returned victorious. Few can boast of such a feat."

"Doesn't have the ring of truth, to my ears." {n}Ulfar does not seem the least impressed by what he has heard.{/n} "On Fenris, the ones sent to the Watch are those who have wronged their brothers and must be removed from our sight."
"Truly said." {n}Ulfar nods with gravity.{/n} "On Fenris, the ones sent to the Deathwatch are those who have fought thousands of battles and returned victorious. Few can boast of such a feat."
"Truly said." {n}Ulfar nods gravely.{/n} "On Fenris, the ones sent to the Deathwatch are those who have fought thousands of battles and returned victorious. Few can boast of such a feat."

languages.text: 「真実味がない」{n}ウルファルは聞いたことに全く感銘を受けていないようである。{/n}「フェンリスでは、監視に送られるのは、兄弟を傷つけた者で、我々の目から消されるべき者である」
languages.original_text: "Doesn't have the ring of truth, to my ears." {n}Ulfar does not seem the least impressed by what he has heard.{/n} "On Fenris, the ones sent to the Watch are those who have wronged their brothers and must be removed from our sight."

traits.locale_text: 「私の耳には、真実味がない」{n}ウルファルは聞いたことに全く感銘を受けていないようである。{n}「フェンリスでは、監視に送られるのは、兄弟を傷つけた者で、我々の目から消されるべき者である」

languages.text: «Bien cierto». {n}Ulfar asiente gravemente.{/n} «En Fenris, los enviados a los Vigías de la Muerte son los que han librado miles de batallas victoriosas. Hay pocos que puedan jactarse de semejantes hazañas».
languages.original_text: "Truly said." {n}Ulfar nods gravely.{/n} "On Fenris, the ones sent to the Deathwatch are those who have fought thousands of battles and returned victorious. Few can boast of such a feat."

traits.locale_text: «Bien cierto». {n}Ulfar asiente gravemente.{/n} «En Fenris, los enviados a los Vigías de la Muerte son los que han librado miles de batallas victoriosas. Hay pocos que puedan jactarse de semejantes hazañas».

languages.text: "Wahre Worte." {n}Ulfar nickt ernst.{/n} "Auf Fenris werden jene in die Deathwatch berufen, die aus Tausenden von Schlachten siegreich zurückkehren. Das gelingt nur wenigen."
languages.original_text: "Truly said." {n}Ulfar nods gravely.{/n} "On Fenris, the ones sent to the Deathwatch are those who have fought thousands of battles and returned victorious. Few can boast of such a feat."

traits.locale_text: "Wahre Worte." {n}Ulfar nickt ernst.{/n} "Auf Fenris werden jene in die Deathwatch berufen, die aus Tausenden von Schlachten siegreich zurückkehren. Das gelingt nur wenigen."

languages.text: « Bien parlé. » {n}Ulfar acquiesce d'un air grave.{/n} « Sur Fenris, seuls ceux qui ont remporté des milliers de batailles sont pressentis pour intégrer la Deathwatch. Il y a donc bien peu de prétendants. »
languages.original_text: "Truly said." {n}Ulfar nods gravely.{/n} "On Fenris, the ones sent to the Deathwatch are those who have fought thousands of battles and returned victorious. Few can boast of such a feat."

traits.locale_text: « Bien parlé. » {n}Ulfar acquiesce d'un air grave.{/n} « Sur Fenris, seuls ceux qui ont remporté des milliers de batailles sont pressentis pour intégrer la Deathwatch. Il y a donc bien peu de prétendants. »

languages.text: “说得没错。”{n}乌尔法庄重地点了点头。{/n}“在芬里斯，唯有历经千百次战斗而凯旋的勇士，才有资格被派往死亡守望。这般功绩，鲜有人能企及。”
languages.original_text: "Truly said." {n}Ulfar nods gravely.{/n} "On Fenris, the ones sent to the Deathwatch are those who have fought thousands of battles and returned victorious. Few can boast of such a feat."

traits.locale_text: “说得没错。”{n}乌尔法庄重地点了点头。{/n}“在芬里斯，唯有历经千百次战斗而凯旋的勇士，才有资格被派往死亡守望。这般功绩，鲜有人能企及。”

languages.text: "Doğru söze ne denir." {n}Ulfar ciddiyetle başını sallıyor.{/n} "Fenris'te Ölümnöbeti'ne gönderilenler, binlerce savaşa katılmış ve zaferle dönmüş olanlardır. Çok az kimse böyle bir başarıyla övünebilir."
languages.original_text: "Truly said." {n}Ulfar nods gravely.{/n} "On Fenris, the ones sent to the Deathwatch are those who have fought thousands of battles and returned victorious. Few can boast of such a feat."

traits.locale_text: "Doğru söze ne denir." {n}Ulfar ciddiyetle başını sallıyor.{/n} "Fenris'te Ölümnöbeti'ne gönderilenler, binlerce savaşa katılmış ve zaferle dönmüş olanlardır. Çok az kimse böyle bir başarıyla övünebilir."
